title: pavonia schweinfurthii
intro: Pavonia schweinfurthii, also known as the African hawthorn or Swiss cheese vine, is a flowering plant native to tropical Africa. It is known for its medicinal properties, particularly in treating various health conditions due to its high content of flavonoids and glycosides. The plant has been used to reduce blood pressure and cholesterol levels, as well as to treat fever, rheumatism, and digestive issues. Traditional herbal preparations include infusions, decoctions, and tinctures made from the leaves, roots, and stems, which can be used to treat a range of ailments.
